headline: Potential Deutsche Telekom T-Mobile US Merger Could Reshape Global Wireless Leader
summary: Deutsche Telekom is reportedly exploring a full merger with T-Mobile US, its majority-owned subsidiary. The deal would create a new holding company listed in both the U.S. and Europe. If completed, it could be one of the largest public M&A transactions to date in global telecoms. For investors tracking XTRA:DTE, this potential merger comes at a time when Deutsche Telekom shares trade around €27.53 and longer term returns remain mixed. The stock is up 103.2% over 5 years and 36.1% over 3...
